summary: Reframed the opening around the walkway rattle so the chapter no longer enters on the same weather-time scaffold as Chapter 8, and adjusted the final bed positioning to hand off more cleanly into Chapter 8's dawn tableau.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin with the bat-lab walkway rattling instead of a time-and-weather lead.
Kept the storm setup and camp soundscape intact while preserving the chapter's original information and tone.
Adjusted the final resting positions so Tomas's forearm and Rhea's leg placement align more smoothly with the next chapter's opening image.
